name: io.github.Grinv/tmdb-mcp
title: TMDB MCP Server
description: MCP server for The Movie Database (TMDB) with IMDb/Rotten Tomatoes/Metacritic ratings via OMDb.

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Required. TMDB v4 'Read Access Token' from themoviedb.org/settings/api (sent as a Bearer token).

environmentVariables.name: OMDB_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Free key from omdbapi.com — enables IMDb/Rotten Tomatoes/Metacritic ratings.

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_LANGUAGE
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Default response language as ISO-639-1, optionally with a region (e.g. ru-RU, en-US, ja).

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Default ISO-3166-1 country code (e.g. US, RU, GB) for region-specific results.
